videos.title: 88 ROOMS - GranFONDO Belgrade partner
videos.description:
After registration on http://granfondobelgrade.rs/ you will receive code to enter on site http://88rooms.com/ and get a discount for accommodation.

videos.title: Skyline GranFONDO Belgrade 2017
videos.description:
Želeli smo da započnemo novu tradiciju i upišemo Beograd​ u biciklističku mapu sveta. Uspeli smo, a u tome nam je pomoglo čak 487 biciklista, 20 fotografa, 35 volontera, preko 100 ljudi iz organizacije i još više onih koji su nas bodrili i podržavali! 

Učestvovanjem u prvoj Skyline GranFondo Belgrade trci u Srbiji zajedno smo postali deo biciklističke istorije koja će se SIGURNO ponoviti!

video credits: Skyoptic - Snimanje iz vazduha​ www.snimanje.rs & Soultime Media​

Epic Music Mania. "Finger Music - Ultra (Epic Intense Hybrid 
           Action)" YouTube. YouTube, 04 July 2015. Web. 
           05 August 2016.

videos.title: 1st Time to Gran Fondo Cycles
videos.description: We welcome the first time buyer to Gran Fondo. We pride ourselves on our ability to insure that our customers leave our shop with the most bike for their money. We won't sell a bike that doesn't fit; our bikes fit your budget, our bikes fit your physique, our bikes will fit your needs and dreams. Expect to have choices - aluminum, steel and carbon frames, equipped with parts groups at varying quality levels. So you don't know what the difference in "105" and "Apex" means to you? Let us tell you about it! Ride both - understand why you want one over the other, or just trust us to sell you the right bike. We guarantee you will be pleased.
videos.transcript:
